content:
# Kharaib Formation

**Summary**: A carbonate reservoir formation in the UAE.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-yusmananto|Yusmananto, 2024]] investigated the kharaib-formation for CO2 storage.

## Depositional Environment

- [[2024-yusmananto|Yusmananto, 2024]] epeiric carbonate platform

## Reservoir Properties

- [[2024-yusmananto|Yusmananto, 2024]] porosity 10-30%, permeability 0.1-50 mD (for FA3)

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The Upper Kharaib shows a shoaling trend from wackestone to grainstone facies. ([[2024-yusmananto|Yusmananto, 2024, p. 100]])
